stories.title: Rockies take advantage of Vegas heat, score 23
stories.summary: The Rockies took advantage of a 101-degree afternoon in Las Vegas to set a franchise record for runs with 23 in Sunday's victory over the Athletics.

stories.title: Three teams ahead of Knicks in 2027 title odds
stories.summary: Three teams -- the Spurs, Thunder and Celtics -- have better odds to win the 2027 NBA championship than the Knicks at sportsbooks around the nation.

stories.title: Liberty clinch spot in Commissioner's Cup final
stories.summary: The Liberty beat the Mystics 86-64 on Sunday and clinched a spot in the Commissioner's Cup championship game.

stories.title: Koeman: Dutch hit 'minimal standard' vs. Japan
stories.summary: Ronald Koeman said Netherlands' performance in Sunday's 2-2 draw against Japan should be their "minimal standard" if they are to win the World Cup.

stories.title: Cauley, 36, wins Canadian Open, 1st PGA Tour title...
stories.summary: Just more than two years after he returned to the PGA Tour following a car accident, Bud Cauley, 36, won the RBC Canadian Open on Sunday for his first tour title in his 239th start, closing with a 5-under 65 to get to 17-under 263 for the tournament.
